name: Solegreen Ltd
summary: Solegreen Ltd engages in the renewable energy business in Israel. It operates and maintains solar energy facilities. The company was formerly known as Procognia (Israel) Ltd. and changed its name to Solegreen Ltd in January 2015. Solegreen Ltd was founded in 2000 and is based in Herzliya, Israel. As per the transaction announced on September 3, 2018, Solegreen Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Lahav Green Mountains Ltd.
